ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used to collect the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes the tweet has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the hashtag belongs to */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag text */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Sentiment analysis of the hashtag (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the sentiment belongs to */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment text (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis used (e.g., machine learning, rule-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the engagement belongs to */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, like, reply) */,
  "engagement_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the mention belongs to */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., user, hashtag, URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL text */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., image, video, link) */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* Title of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet the media belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the media (e.g., width, height) */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
